---
title: "Facilities & Capabilities"
description: "A provisional overview of OptoLAB experimental capabilities."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/facilities.html"
---

OptoLAB works across optical, electronic and computational prototyping. A verified equipment inventory is being prepared; no specific instrument, performance range or access condition is claimed on this page.

::: {.card-grid .three}
::: {.topic-card}
### Optical prototyping

Experimental layouts for illumination, collection, imaging and spectral sensing.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
### Electronic instrumentation

Sensor interfaces, acquisition electronics and optoelectronic system integration.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
### Embedded platforms

Device control, synchronized acquisition, communication and edge processing.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
### Calibration workflows

Methods and software for traceable comparison, sensor characterization and model fitting.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
### Imaging software

Tools for experimental control, data inspection, reconstruction and analysis.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
### Technology demonstrators

Integrated prototypes used to explore research questions and system trade-offs.
:::
:::

## Equipment information to verify

Before this page becomes an equipment catalogue, each entry must include an approved name, manufacturer and model where appropriate, measurement purpose, key verified specifications, access conditions, responsible contact and an authorized image.
